title: Clear Smoky Ukrainian Orange Stew
description: A smoky and savory Ukrainian stew featuring orange, perfect for a solo dinner, and friendly to Buddhist temple dietary preferences.
instructions: In a large kazan cauldron, heat the smoked paprika over low heat for 1 minute.
Add the chopped onions and cook until they are translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional 1 minute.
Add the sliced carrots and cubed potatoes, cook for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Add the vegetable broth, tomato paste, agave nectar, salt, and black pepper, stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 20 minutes.
Add the freshly squeezed orange juice and stir to combine.
Continue to simmer for an additional 10 minutes, or until the stew has thickened and reduced slightly.
Remove the cauldron from the heat and let the stew cool slightly before serving.
